executionHistory.summary: Spec authored with full requirements, use cases, business scenarios, and actor personas

Design authored: wrapper connector over existing browser.go utilities, copy-then-read file access, cursor-based incremental sync, social media aggregation, repeat visit detection, dwell-time privacy tiers, no new NATS streams or DB migrations

2-scope plan created: Scope 1 covers Connector interface, ParseChromeHistorySince, config, registration, and basic sync flow. Scope 2 adds social media aggregation, repeat visit detection, privacy gate, and content fetch failure handling.

Implemented both scopes: connector.go (540 lines) with full Connector interface, social media aggregation, repeat visit detection, privacy gate, content fetch failure handling. connector_test.go (838 lines) with 21 tests. Registered in main.go with auto-start. Config added to smackerel.yaml.

All unit tests pass (33 tests in connector_test.go, 10 tests in browser_test.go). ./smackerel.sh test unit — browser package ok 0.017s. Added boundary, edge case, content fetch, repeat escalation, multi-day aggregation, and bad-input tests.

Regression verification complete. All 25 Go packages pass, 44 Python tests pass. Fixed R001 (pipeline tier.go SourceID check for browser-history) and R002 (configurable dwell thresholds were dead code). Added regression tests TestAssignTier_BrowserHistorySourceID, TestProcessEntries_CustomDwellThresholds.
Simplification pass completed. Reviewed connector.go for unnecessary complexity. Single-file connector with clear processEntries pipeline. No dead code, no over-abstractions. No changes needed.
Gap analysis complete. All 10 Gherkin scenarios (SCN-BH-001 through SCN-BH-010) have mapped tests. All 2 scopes have DoD items covering all acceptance criteria. No orphaned scenarios.
Hardening pass completed. Reviewed spec/design/scopes for completeness. Gherkin scenarios well-formed. Test plan covers all scenarios. DoD items verifiable. No issues found.
Stabilization pass completed. All tests deterministic — no flaky failures. No time-dependent assertions. No external network calls in unit tests. Temp dirs cleaned up via t.TempDir().

Security review complete. Copy-then-read prevents SQLite lock injection. Temp file cleanup via defer os.Remove. Config uses SST pipeline — no hardcoded values. Privacy gate ensures metadata-only entries do not persist full URLs.
Validation complete. ./smackerel.sh test unit — all 25 packages pass. ./smackerel.sh lint — exit 0. ./smackerel.sh check — config in sync. Both scopes Done with all DoD items verified.

Audit pass completed. Code follows existing connector patterns (Keep, Maps, Bookmarks). No config SST violations. NATS contract not modified. No new migrations. Docker Compose has browser-history config section under SST pipeline.

Chaos pass completed. Copy failure retry verified (TestCopyHistoryFile_RetryOnFailure). Content fetch failure handled (TestProcessEntries_ContentFetchFailure). Bad cursor input handled (TestParseCursorToChrome_BadInput). History file not found handled (TestConnect_HistoryFileNotFound). Edge-case domains handled (TestExtractDomain_EdgeCases).
Documentation pass completed. report.md updated with test evidence, validation evidence, audit evidence, chaos evidence. scopes.md DoD items have evidence blocks. uservalidation.md updated.
Spec review completed. spec.md, design.md, scopes.md consistent. No stale or superseded content. All requirements traceable to implementation.
All unit tests pass (43 tests across 2 test files), lint passes, format passes, check passes. Both scopes marked Done with verified DoD items. Delivery lockdown certification complete.

scopeProgress.name: Social Media Aggregation, Repeat Visits & Privacy Gate
